## Vertick IME 0.1.2

### English

- Fixed the final uncommitted Pinyin initial being confirmed during deletion. An unfinished composition now deletes completely with no extra Backspace.
- Sliding away from a pressed key now cancels the key instead of inserting another key at release.
- Removed Send, Delete, and `@` controls from Smart Q&A mode.
- Smart Q&A now shows `Vertick Knows` (维刻知道) in the processing capsule with the same progress animation as dictation polishing.
- Dictionary changes are staged in the background for the next Rime deployment, so returning to the keyboard after editing a custom term no longer stalls input.

### 简体中文

- 修复未上屏拼音删除到最后一个字母时仍会被确认上屏的问题，现在可以一次删完。
- 修复按住按键后滑动会误输入滑动位置字母的问题，滑出原按键即取消输入。
- 智能问答模式移除发送、删除和 `@` 按钮。
- 智能问答处理胶囊显示“维刻知道”，并使用与润色一致的进度动画。
- 词典变更改为后台暂存至下一次 Rime 部署，新增词典后切回键盘不再卡顿。
